narrative:
Holmes County has 17,437 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 28.9% of registrants.
